title: Define L2 payload discriminator for raw routing announces vs SCHC
description: Why this exists: production L2 raw announce dispatch is unsafe today because raw announce Type=0x01 collides with SCHC_RULE_GLOBAL_COAP=1 and canonical global CoAP compressed bytes start with 0x01. Link specs currently describe L2 payload as SCHC-compressed IPv6 while routing specs describe raw announce messages without a link payload namespace. What needs to be done: define an explicit authenticated inner-payload discriminator/wrapper (for example SCHC dispatch 0x14 plus a separate raw routing/announce dispatch namespace), update specs/constants/vectors across C/Python/Rust as needed, and add no-hardware tests proving global CoAP SCHC and raw announces cannot be confused.
notes:
Post-closure follow-up before moving on: final review identified that legacy raw 0x15 KISS REJ fallback still collided with future 0x15 routing/control message types. Fixed by removing raw 0x15 REJ compatibility entirely; KISS REJ now uses only private prefix 0x7f 0x15 and every 0x15... payload remains L2 routing/control.

Additional local validation after this fix:
- cd python && uv run pytest -q tests/interface/test_kiss_bridge.py tests/interface/test_kiss_payload_fmt.py tests/test_l2_payload.py tests/test_node.py tests/test_node_coap_integration.py tests/loadng/test_rreq_jitter.py tests/test_vectors.py: 208 passed, 1 skipped in 0.74s.
- cd python && uv run ruff check src/lichen/interface/kiss/bridge.py src/lichen/interface/kiss/payload_fmt.py tests/interface/test_kiss_bridge.py tests/interface/test_kiss_payload_fmt.py src/lichen/l2_payload.py src/lichen/node.py src/lichen/coap/node_channel.py tests/test_l2_payload.py tests/test_node.py tests/test_node_coap_integration.py tests/loadng/test_rreq_jitter.py tests/test_vectors.py: passed.
- git diff --check: passed.

Additional final code reviews after the fix:
- 019f2510-ac02-7562-88cd-971447ed4182: no P0/P1/P2 findings; verified 0x7f 0x15 KISS REJ and all 0x15... probes route as L2 routing/control; local Python/Rust/diff checks passed.
- 019f2518-e358-7cd0-9b53-e27f78c0e8eb: no P0/P1/P2 findings; verified KISS namespace, Zephyr 0x14||SCHC TX/RX, Python/Rust boundaries, constants/spec/vectors; local Python/Rust/diff checks passed. Reviewer SSH Twister evidence check timed out; main-agent EC2 Twister evidence from the unchanged C patch remains recorded above.
close_reason: Completed authenticated L2 payload discriminator. Implemented 0x14 SCHC and 0x15 routing/control namespace across specs/constants/vectors, Python, Rust, and Zephyr C; added tests and EC2 Twister evidence in notes. Remaining production raw announce dispatch wiring is tracked by project-LICHEN-ct4d/project-LICHEN-8ko4/project-LICHEN-9c0g.
